{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2022-46280", "cvss": {"score": 7.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-824", "name": "Access of Uninitialized Pointer"}], "description": "### Summary

A memory-safety vulnerability in Open Babel's PQS parser caused an
uninitialized pointer dereference when reading a crafted input file.

### Details

The flaw was in the `pFormat` handling of the PQS reader. A malformed
input caused the parser to dereference a format pointer that had
never been initialized.

### Impact

Open Babel is a C++ library and CLI used to read and write chemistry
file formats; it is shipped by Linux distributions and embedded in
services that may parse untrusted input. Triggering this vulnerability
requires the victim to open a malicious PQS file with the `obabel`
tool, the `OBConversion` API, or any of the language bindings (Python,
Ruby, Java, R, Perl, C#, PHP).

### Affected versions

All releases up to and including 3.1.1.

### Patched version

3.2.0 (released 2026-05-26).

### Patch

Fix commit: https://github.com/openbabel/openbabel/commit/2a7d2cda

A minimized reproducer for this CVE is checked in under
`test/files/fuzz_regress/` and is exercised on every CI build under
ASAN+UBSAN by the `fuzzregresstest` harness.

### Credit

Reported by Cisco TALOS.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00843, "percentile": 0.5351}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-8qxc-57hf-hc9j", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-01T17:48:54Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8qxc-57hf-hc9j", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-8qxc-57hf-hc9j"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2022-46280"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-01T17:48:54Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openbabel/openbabel/security/advisories/GHSA-8qxc-57hf-hc9j", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2022-46280", "https://github.com/openbabel/openbabel/commit/2a7d2cda8bd47daade2e555e34b69651a2e132ef", "https://talosintelligence.com/vulnerability_reports/TALOS-2022-1670", "https://www.talosintelligence.com/vulnerability_reports/TALOS-2022-1670", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8qxc-57hf-hc9j"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openbabel/openbabel/security-advisories/GHSA-8qxc-57hf-hc9j", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openbabel/openbabel", "summary": "Open Babel has uninitialized pointer dereference in PQS pFormat", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-01T17:48:56Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-8qxc-57hf-hc9j", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.2.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "openbabel"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.2.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Open Babel has uninitialized pointer dereference in PQS pFormat
